scenario: Checkout flow with reported drop-off — want a heuristic pass before reaching for analytics
when_to_pick: You have a flow with measurable friction and want a structured inspection before user research

scenario: Sign-up form with 12 fields that customers complain about — want field-by-field friction review
when_to_pick: Form is the surface; you want labels, validation, error copy, sequence inspected

scenario: Dashboard nav is being redesigned; want IA / wayfinding review before the team commits
when_to_pick: Pre-implementation IA pass on a navigation redesign

scenario: Error states across the product feel punitive and confusing — want a sweep of recovery copy and behavior
when_to_pick: Error and recovery copy is the surface, not the happy path

scenario: Accessibility readiness check before a launch — keyboard, screen-reader, contrast, focus, semantics
when_to_pick: Pre-launch a11y pass; treats WCAG as baseline and flags manual-verification items
